title: What to expect from the 63rd edition of the Bengaluru Ganesh Utsava in 2025
description: The 11-day festival will have musical performances by Vijay Prakash, Raghu Dixit, Rajesh Krishnan, Vijay Yesudas, M.D. Pallavi, and Praveen Godkhindi, as well as along with a food festival and cultural events
